branch_manifest.description: TRUNCATE TABLE clears all existing rows from silver.DimCurrency before the INSERT executes
INSERT SELECT via sp_executesql executes the dynamic SQL string, loading currency data from MigrationTest.bronze.Currency into silver.DimCurrency
When source table MigrationTest.bronze.Currency is empty, the INSERT SELECT produces no rows
CurrencyKey is an identity column that auto-increments; each inserted row receives the next sequential identity value
Source column CurrencyCode is inserted into target column CurrencyAlternateKey
Source column CurrencyName is inserted directly into target column CurrencyName
Multiple rows from source are inserted as a batch operation
All target columns (CurrencyAlternateKey, CurrencyName) are NOT NULL; source data must have valid values

unit_tests.description: Verify TRUNCATE removes all pre-existing rows before INSERT
Verify INSERT SELECT correctly loads currencies from bronze source
unit_tests.assertion: silver.DimCurrency contains 3 rows with correct currency codes and names

unit_tests.description: Verify no rows are inserted when source is empty
Verify identity column auto-increments for each inserted row
unit_tests.precondition: silver.DimCurrency is empty; MigrationTest.bronze.Currency has 3 currencies

unit_tests.description: Verify identity seed continues after TRUNCATE (identity is not reset to seed)
unit_tests.precondition: Execute usp_load_DimCurrency to insert rows with keys 1, 2, 3; then execute again
unit_tests.assertion: New rows get keys 4, 5, 6 (not restarting from 1)

unit_tests.description: Verify CurrencyCode from source maps to CurrencyAlternateKey in target
Verify CurrencyName from source flows to target
unit_tests.precondition: MigrationTest.bronze.Currency has row with CurrencyName='US Dollar'
unit_tests.assertion: silver.DimCurrency has row with CurrencyName='US Dollar'

unit_tests.description: Verify batch INSERT handles multiple rows correctly
unit_tests.assertion: silver.DimCurrency contains all 5 currencies with correct mappings

unit_tests.description: Verify NOT NULL constraint on CurrencyAlternateKey is enforced
unit_tests.precondition: MigrationTest.bronze.Currency has all non-null CurrencyCode values
unit_tests.assertion: All inserted rows have non-null CurrencyAlternateKey; no constraint violation

unit_tests.description: Verify NOT NULL constraint on CurrencyName is enforced
unit_tests.precondition: MigrationTest.bronze.Currency has all non-null CurrencyName values
unit_tests.assertion: All inserted rows have non-null CurrencyName; no constraint violation

warnings.message: Write logic is embedded in sp_executesql called with a NVARCHAR variable (@sql), so the INSERT SQL is not statically visible to the scoping agent. However, the recovered SQL is documented, and test specifications can be created based on the known semantics of the INSERT SELECT and source/target schema mappings.

details.recovered_sql: INSERT INTO silver.DimCurrency (CurrencyAlternateKey, CurrencyName) SELECT CurrencyCode, CurrencyName FROM MigrationTest.bronze.Currency
details.note: Tests can cover the fixture-resolvable parts: TRUNCATE, identity generation, column mapping, NOT NULL constraints, and multi-row insert handling.
